metadata.description: Enterprise Claude Code plugin marketplace for AgentHub connector and internal skill workflows.
metadata.note: For Claude Code installation from Git, prefer adding the repository marketplace at .claude-plugin/marketplace.json. This HTTP view is provided so agents and engineers can discover the official plugin entry from the deployed AgentHub.

plugins.name: agenthub-connector-plugin
plugins.description: Connect Claude Code to AgentHub Enterprise, fetch onboarding metadata, build install plans, install recommended skills, and run Harness workflows.
